title: External Agent Write API — Inspection Event Payload (v1.0)
description: Payload shape for envelope.event_type='inspection'. Routes to vehicle_observations with observation_kind='condition', source slug 'agent-submission'. Use when the agent is recording a deliberate visual / mechanical inspection (PPI, walk-around, photo audit) — not work performed. Strict closed schema: the form is a checklist.

summary.description: 1–2 sentence headline of the inspection (e.g. 'Pre-purchase inspection at Boulder City lot — bones look solid, deferred maintenance heavy').

narrative.description: Free-form long-form notes from the inspection.

inspection_type.description: What kind of inspection this is. Drives downstream filtering and weighting.

inspector_role.description: Who performed the inspection. 'agent_vision' = LLM analyzing photos; 'owner_self' = vehicle owner with phone; 'shop' = professional shop.

zones_inspected.description: Subsystems actually examined during the inspection. Closed enum aligned with service.zones_touched.

findings.description: Discrete observations made during the inspection. Each finding is a testimony atom on the vehicle's timeline.

evidence_photo_ref.description: Optional caller-side photo identifier (URL or sha256) supporting this finding.

overall_condition.description: Single-word rollup of vehicle condition. Coarse on purpose; details belong in findings.

deferred_maintenance_minutes.description: Estimated wrench-time backlog the inspector identified, in minutes.

photos_referenced.description: Caller-side identifiers (URL or sha256) of photos that anchor the inspection.
